sentence_reviews.text: Simulation infrastructure runs many reproducible environments, scenarios, agents, and sensor models for training, evaluation, and synthetic-data generation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Digital twin and scenario generation surveys support simulated environments/scenarios and AI use cases; reproducibility and sensor models are plausible but not fully exact.
sentence_reviews.notes: Good conceptual support from packet sources.

sentence_reviews.text: It supplies the interaction volume and controlled counterfactuals needed by embodied, game, and operational AI.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Sources support simulation/scenario generation for AI and autonomous driving; game and operational AI are broader extrapolations.
sentence_reviews.notes: Defensible synthesis; exact downstream categories are atlas-derived.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Digital twin AI supports simulation; distributed systems source supports parallel operational infrastructure. Robot simulator specifics are indirect.
Scenario generation survey for autonomous driving supports traffic scenarios.
sentence_reviews.notes: Strong conceptual fit; 'farms' as scaling infrastructure is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Existing packet sources plus added topic-specific source URL(s); reviewed as a synthesis-level support claim rather than a direct quotation.

sentence_reviews.text: Fidelity, scenario coverage, determinism, and compute cost determine whether simulated conclusions transfer.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Simulation/digital twin and scenario-generation sources support fidelity and scenario coverage concerns; determinism and compute cost are plausible operational additions.
sentence_reviews.notes: Well supported as synthesis, but not exact phrase-level verification.
